Typography

Font families, size scale, weight spectrum, line height, and letter spacing tokens.

Font Families

Three font families for different use cases — sans-serif for UI, monospace for code, serif for long-form reading.

Sans-serif (UI)

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. 1234567890

--font-family-sans: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif

Monospace (Code)

const hello = "world"; // fn() => 42

--font-family-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Fira Mono', 'Roboto Mono', monospace

Serif (Reading)

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

--font-family-serif: Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif
tokens.css 
--font-family-sans: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
--font-family-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Fira Mono', 'Roboto Mono', monospace;
--font-family-serif: Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;

Font Sizes

A 10-step scale from xs (0.75rem) to 6xl (3.75rem).

--font-size-xs 0.75rem 12px Captions & metadata
--font-size-sm 0.875rem 14px Small text & labels
--font-size-base 1rem 16px Body text
--font-size-lg 1.125rem 18px Large body
--font-size-xl 1.25rem 20px Sub-headings
--font-size-2xl 1.5rem 24px Section headings
--font-size-3xl 1.875rem 30px Page headings
--font-size-4xl 2.25rem 36px Hero headings
--font-size-5xl 3rem 48px Large hero
--font-size-6xl 3.75rem 60px Display text

Display (6xl)

Hero (4xl)

Page Heading (3xl)

Section Heading (2xl)

Large Body (lg)

Body Text (base)

Caption (sm)

Font Weights

A complete weight spectrum from thin (100) to black (900).

--font-weight-thin 100 The quick brown fox thin
--font-weight-extralight 200 The quick brown fox extralight
--font-weight-light 300 The quick brown fox light
--font-weight-normal 400 The quick brown fox normal
--font-weight-medium 500 The quick brown fox medium
--font-weight-semibold 600 The quick brown fox semibold
--font-weight-bold 700 The quick brown fox bold
--font-weight-extrabold 800 The quick brown fox extrabold
--font-weight-black 900 The quick brown fox black

Line Height & Letter Spacing

Line Heights

--line-height-none 1
--line-height-tight 1.25
--line-height-snug 1.375
--line-height-normal 1.5
--line-height-relaxed 1.625
--line-height-loose 2

Letter Spacing

--letter-spacing-tighter -0.05em Tracking
--letter-spacing-tight -0.025em Tracking
--letter-spacing-normal 0em Tracking
--letter-spacing-wide 0.025em Tracking
--letter-spacing-wider 0.05em Tracking
--letter-spacing-widest 0.1em Tracking
ESC
Type to search components, guides, tokens, and more…

Storyhouse Design System

Built for scale, precision, and exceptional developer experience.
